nodes.label: Cognitive Layer Thesis (v3)
nodes.rationale: v3 turned the journal (v2: capture + analytics) into a cognitive layer that changes trader behavior; the unit of value became 'the verified behavior change', not 'the logged trade'. Guiding principle: every screen serves a function; no chart that doesn't produce a decision; every insight ends in an action. Design built the brain before the skin: pure tested logic landed invisible, UI made it observable later.
